betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§o"I seem to have drawn the attention of some higher members of the Crimson Cult. I expect this fight to be much more difficult than what I've experienced with the normal cultists."

§4§c§l§r§cDo not complete this quest until you are prepared to fight the Crimson Praetor.§l§r§c Claiming the quest reward for this quests will spawn the Crimson Praetor so that he can be battled.
betterquesting:10.name:8: A Leader of the Crimson Cult
